text.message: just a heads up, I'm petty when half cooked

Shoot one short of what I needed
lol plowing you would be if I went to the 9 tree
That was the next move haha
lol I wanted that spot too sorry haha you went to the 3:1 first left it open
All blue robs from here on tho they’re very strong
If you wanna throw the game that’s up to you
Not sure if me robbing them the one time instead of you would have stopped them
Would have made me feel better about you though :)
Ur opinion of me is all I care about
im not going for road or army
Number of cards shouldn’t matter you’re way ahead
A 6 and a 3 and it’s game
Don’t even think we can stop you you’ll win in a round or two
Not going for army —> buys 2 devs
im the steal and i understand that
